allow: Bash(touch notebooks/.gitkeep data/raw/.gitkeep data/clean/.gitkeep data/features/.gitkeep runs/.gitkeep tests/fixtures/.gitkeep)
Bash(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k != 'per_day_summary'}, indent=2\)\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -c "from scipy import stats; print\('scipy ok'\)")
Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_distribution.py tests/test_drawdowns.py tests/test_subperiod.py tests/test_monte_carlo.py -v --tb=short)

Bash(.venv/Scripts/python.exe -m pytest tests/test_stats.py tests/test_distribution.py tests/test_drawdowns.py tests/test_subperiod.py tests/test_monte_carlo.py tests/test_walkforward.py -v --tb=short)
Bash(gh pr create --base session-23a-instrument-featureset --title 'feat\(session-23b\): Strategy & StrategyTemplate protocols with registry' --body ' *)

hooks.command: cd C:/Trading-research && mkdir -p outputs/work-log && recent_log=$(find outputs/work-log -name '*.md' -mmin -120 2>/dev/null | head -1) && if [ -z "$recent_log" ]; then echo "No session work log found."; exit 2; fi
hooks.rewakeMessage: No session work log was written. Before finishing, write a summary to outputs/work-log/YYYY-MM-DD-HH-MM-summary.md. Cover: what was completed, key files changed or created, decisions made, and what the next session should start from. Keep it concise — one page. Then stop.
